name: Image Compressor
description: Compress images without losing quality. Reduce file size online.
keywords: compress image, reduce image size, image compressor online, compress jpg, compress png, image optimizer
howToUse: 1. Upload image 2. Set compression quality 3. Click Compress 4. Download compressed file
faq: Q: Will quality decrease? A: Minimal loss at 70-80% quality. Q: Max file size? A: 10MB.
